package handler

import (
	"testing"

	"gorm.io/driver/sqlite"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Positive scenario for migration_tests_live_under_handler_packages.
// Rule intent: Migration-specific tests located in transport/handler packages.
// Anti-pattern: Migration test file lives under handler/ instead of migration/ or internal/db/.

type Product struct {
	ID    uint   `gorm:"primaryKey"`
	Name  string `gorm:"column:name"`
	Price int    `gorm:"column:price"`
}

func TestMigration_AddPriceColumn(t *testing.T) {
	db, err := gorm.Open(sqlite.Open(":memory:"), &gorm.Config{})
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("failed to open db: %v", err)
	}

	err = db.AutoMigrate(&Product{})
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("migration failed: %v", err)
	}

	var product Product
	if err := db.First(&product).Error; err == nil {
		t.Log("migration applied successfully")
	}
}

func TestMigration_RollbackPriceColumn(t *testing.T) {
	db, err := gorm.Open(sqlite.Open(":memory:"), &gorm.Config{})
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("failed to open db: %v", err)
	}

	err = db.AutoMigrate(&Product{})
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("migration failed: %v", err)
	}

	err = db.Migrator().DropColumn(&Product{}, "price")
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("rollback failed: %v", err)
	}
}

func TestHandler_GetProducts(t *testing.T) {
	db, _ := gorm.Open(sqlite.Open(":memory:"), &gorm.Config{})
	db.AutoMigrate(&Product{})
	db.Create(&Product{Name: "Widget", Price: 999})

	var products []Product
	db.Find(&products)

	if len(products) != 1 {
		t.Errorf("expected 1 product, got %d", len(products))
	}
}
